title: Appendix #A-17 ORS Troubleshooting Guide
body_text:
Appendix #A-17	ORS Troubleshooting Guide
Action/
System
Description
Notes
ORS Menu Bar
Missing Summary, Preference, Upload, Reports links
Contact your User Management Security Officer; you may be set up with incorrect ORS User Type
Cheque Images
Image does not show; see red âXâ instead
Check status colour/clearing region of item. If it is yellow and OOP/OOR, cheques have not arrived at Central 1
OR
Check Alerts page and/or email for notifications about potential delays in cheques arriving at Central 1
OR
If neither of the above, could be a problem with a reinstate; contact Central 1 Client Support Services
Cheque Images
No image, instead get Image Unavailable picture
Do not return these items through ORS. Contact Central 1âs Tracing Department to request a copy of the item
(Central 1 may not receive a cheque from OOP/OOR or an item may mis-sort so a subdocument indicating Image Unavailable is used in place of the image)
Cheque Images
Image is unclear
Contact Central 1âs Clearing Department to request a better copy of the item. They will locate and fax a copy of the item to you
Cheque Returns
E link is missing
Check current time; after 6:00 pm PT, the E link disappears
OR
Check menu bar at top for Summary link; if Summary link is not present, contact your User Management Security Officer; you may have been set up with incorrect ORS User Type
AFT Returns
E link is missing
Check the RI column â if status is Complete (C), this item has already been returned to the originating FI therefore the E link is no longer available.
There are 3 return processing windows â 10:00 am, 3:30 pm, 11:00 pm PT.
AFT Notice of Change
N link is missing
Check the N column â if status is Complete (C), this item has already been sent to the originating FI therefore the N link in the A column is no longer available.
